Custom Clothing Manufacturing for US Brands from Pakistan

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

American clothing startups face a tough reality: domestic manufacturing costs $25-50 per hour for labor, making small-batch production prohibitively expensive. Overseas manufacturing is the only viable path — but choosing the right country and factory is critical. At FABRIOZA, we've helped 100+ US-based brands launch and scale their clothing lines from Pakistan with MOQ starting at just 50 pieces and shipping to the USA in 5-7 days via air.

Why US Brands Manufacture in Pakistan

Cost Advantage

Pakistan offers labor costs 70-80% lower than the US and 20-30% lower than China. For a startup watching every dollar, this difference is transformative. A custom hoodie that costs $45-60 to manufacture in the USA costs $12-20 in Pakistan with comparable quality.

Quality Standards

Our ISO 9001:2015 certification meets international standards recognized by US retailers. We produce garments that pass CPSC (Consumer Product Safety Commission) requirements for the US market.

English Communication

All client-facing staff at FABRIOZA are fluent in English. No translation issues, no miscommunication on tech packs.

Time Zone Management

Pakistan is 9-10 hours ahead of US Eastern Time. We schedule our communication to overlap with US business hours — early morning our time matches your afternoon.

Shipping to the USA

MethodTimeCostBest For
DHL Express5-7 business days$6-10/lbUrgent orders, samples
FedEx International5-7 business days$6-10/lbMedium orders
Air Freight7-10 days$4-7/lb50-500 piece orders
Sea Freight (LCL)25-30 days$1-2/lb500+ piece orders
Sea Freight (FCL)25-30 days$0.50-1/lb1000+ piece orders

US Import Requirements

For US customs clearance, we provide:

  • Commercial invoice with HS codes
  • Packing list with detailed contents
  • Certificate of origin
  • Textile declaration forms
  • Full tracking and customs documentation

What US Startups Say About Us

"I was nervous about manufacturing overseas, but FABRIOZA made it easy. They sent photos at every production stage, the sample was perfect, and my order arrived in 6 days via DHL. I've now placed 4 orders and my customers love the quality." — Jason R., Streetwear Brand, Los Angeles

"The 50-piece MOQ saved my startup. I launched with $800 instead of $5,000, tested 3 designs, and doubled down on what sold. Now I'm ordering 500 pieces monthly." — Sarah M., Gym Wear Brand, Austin
